<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Container; interface ContainerInterface { /** * Creates Redis container command with subcommand as virtual method name * and sends a request to the server. * * @param string $subcommandID * @param array $arguments * @return mixed */ public function __call(string $subcommandID, array $arguments); /** * Returns containerCommandId of specific container command. * * @return string */ public function getContainerCommandId(): string; }
